##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Shields Flynn
##DESCRIPTION=Aggregates of colorless cubic crystals with brown coating, associated with cuprian adamite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
